notes: C3718 Lead: CRITICAL FINDINGS THIS CYCLE — (1) Task #290 (GDPR/email-change/audit-log) has SUBSTANTIAL UNCOMMITTED WORK in working tree: change-email pages, verify-email-change page, /api/customer/data-export route, gdpr-export.ts lib, CustomerActivityFeed component, audit-log.ts lib, email.ts functions, schema fields (pendingEmail/CustomerAuditLog) all exist but NOT committed. _prior_notes: C3697 Lead (bectly directive): 2 major UX tasks created per research. #283 BOLT Filter redesign — convert desktop 4-col dump to left sidebar accordion (Velikost/Barva open by default, Značka/Stav collapsed), hide zero-count options, fix category-aware size groups (closes bugs #280+#282). #284 BOLT PDP polish — title typography (text-balance, max-w-28ch, font-semibold not bold, responsive scale), hide size picker for non-clothing/Jiná sentinel, move Jediný kus badge above ATC, parse description for bullet lists, add 'Velikost kusu' disambiguation helper. Both tasks have detailed specs with file:line refs, acceptance criteria, reference URLs from Baymard/commerce-ui PDP study. force_next=bolt. Follow-on: Trace visual QA after each commit. Added #258 BOLT (dry-run preview + typed-confirm gate on VintedCampaignButton — safety UX, read-only server action) and #259 TRACE (E2E audit of full send path: double-click, concurrent serverless, rate-limit, unsubscribe filter, Resend error path lock retention). Turso measurement backfill was flagged as prod gap (0/354 vs dev 255/354) — solving via admin UI instead of terminal: new Task #240 BOLT (admin button to run extractor against live Prisma, no env vars needed) + #241 BOLT (admin dashboard coverage panel — measurements/defects/images/video stats with deep-links to missing-X filters). schema.pause: Map of agent_name to condition (paused or until_next_bolt_commit or until_lead_directive)
schema.force_next: Agent name to force as next scheduled, or null. Cleared after use.
schema.interval_override: Map of agent_name to run_every integer
